applications.name: MK_editor
applications.purpose: Optional desktop editor shell built by the `desktop-gui` lane. The previous SDL3/Dear ImGui shell has been replaced by a clean Win32/Dear ImGui/Direct3D 12 implementation owned privately under `editor/src`, with `MK_editor_core` remaining the supported editor logic and AI-operable retained-model surface for project IO, authoring, profiler rows, generated game studio rows, input rebinding rows, play-in-editor review rows, game-module driver tests, and the first native panel set. The shell renders Main Menu, Scene, Inspector, Assets, Console, Resources, AI Commands, Profiler, Timeline, and Project Settings panels over editor-core models and reports deterministic `editor_shell_backend=d3d12`, `editor_shell_panels=10`, and `editor_shell_sdl3=0` smoke counters. `tools/build-gui.ps1` configures, builds, and tests the native GUI lane, and `tools/evaluate-cpp23.ps1 -Gui` covers the C++23 GUI preset. The shell must not depend on SDL3 or expose Win32, D3D12, DXGI, swapchain, descriptor heap, or Dear ImGui handles through public editor, engine, gameplay, or runtime UI APIs.
